insights.title: Core business decelerating
insights.claim: Core operating metrics (revenues, operating income) are decelerating together — growth moved from +82.1% to +51.4% YoY in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

insights.title: Operating margin decelerating
insights.claim: Operating margin growth moved from +39.6% to +4.0% YoY in the latest quarter. Trailing-twelve-month growth does not yet confirm. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
